highlights: Implements review-centric UX components (swipe cards, progress bars, rating flows) for retention loops.
Uses dedicated sync/auth/review hooks to keep learning state coherent across sessions.
Combines gamification mechanics with practical study cadence rather than novelty-only interaction.
impact: Established a robust foundation for habit-forming recall practice with measurable review progression.
one_liner: Cross-platform spaced-repetition learning app focused on retention, review flow, and study consistency.
problem: Standard flashcard tools often fail to sustain engagement and consistent review behavior over time.
solution: Built a mobile/web learning architecture with structured review sessions, sync-aware state, and gamified reinforcement.
title: Mnemonic Learning App
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
